judge_reason: Description A describes the visual content of a stamped document while Description B describes a typed text block about an observation, which are fundamentally different visual content types.
original_image_tags: A photostat copy of a typed statement on dark paper. At the top center, the word "CONFIDENTIAL" is stamped and crossed out with a single horizontal line. At the bottom center, the word "CONFIDENTIAL" is stamped and crossed out with a single horizontal line. Two hole-punch marks are visible on the left margin. Two white, circular artifact marks are visible at the very bottom edge, likely from fasteners or scan artifacts. A small handwritten annotation in the bottom right corner reads "60".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A single scanned document page with a dark background, faint typed paragraph at the top about “Mr. Woodruff” seeing a flying disc, “CONFIDENTIAL” stamped near the top and again near the bottom, two punch holes along the left edge, and a small handwritten “50” in the lower-right corner.*
